_meta.purpose: Complete official municipality (Gemeinde) list for all 9 Austrian Bundeslaender, for deterministic source discovery (scripts/probe-sources.mjs). name + Bundesland + official website domain where obtainable; website=null where not found in the source list (prober guesses canonical patterns).
sources: data/sources-austria.json (1653 municipalities across Burgenland/Kaernten/Niederoesterreich/Salzburg/Steiermark/Tirol/Vorarlberg + Wien, agent-curated from Wikipedia Gemeindelisten, prior session)

data/sources-ooe.json (436 Oberoesterreich municipalities, agent-curated from Wikipedia OOe Gemeindeliste, prior session; 2 statutory cities Steyr/Wels were missing from this list and added by hand below with officially known .gv.at domains)
Wikipedia per-Bundesland Gemeindeliste pages (counts cross-checked) + Statistik Austria / Gemeindebund municipality counts as of 1.1.2025 for the official per-Bundesland totals
known_gaps: website is null for 331 of 438 Oberoesterreich entries (sources-ooe.json was only partially enriched with domains) — the prober's canonical-pattern guessing (www.<slug>.at / www.<slug>.gv.at / <slug>.ooe.gv.at) is expected to resolve most of these.
website is null for 5 entries outside Oberoesterreich (Andlersdorf/Grosshofen NOe, Nussdorf-Debant Tirol, Deutsch Jahrndorf/Heugraben Burgenland) for the same reason.
Counts match the official 1.1.2025 Statistik Austria / Gemeindebund total (2092) exactly once the 2 missing OOe statutory cities were added by hand; no other gap remains.
